warning: This vocabulary is a placeholder shipped with PR-06. It has NOT been reviewed by a clinical advisor. CLAUDE.md Open Items tracks the clinical-advisor recruit; quarterly review of this file is the long-term cadence. Until a clinical advisor lands, treat detections as best-effort signals, not authoritative crisis identification.
matching_notes: Detection uses lowercase substring match on entry content.
Substring matching has false-positive risk (e.g. 'killed it on the ice' contains 'kill' as substring of 'killed'; we use multi-word phrases to reduce this).
Multi-word phrases are intentional. Single-word triggers like 'die' or 'kill' produce too many false positives in athlete language.
Order of categories below matters: detector returns the FIRST matching category, so most-urgent goes first.
